user.title: Configure Link&Track
user.description:
Enter your Link&Track API **User** and **Token**.

> **Test Mode:** If you do not have an account, leave both fields completely blank and click SUBMIT to use the free test version.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid credentials. Please check your User and Token.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Link&Track API.

abort.already_configured: The Correios Tracker integration is already configured.
